description: Aggregated table/list views showing multiple resources

commands.description: List clusters in table format with dynamic condition columns

executions.output:
ID                                    NAME                GEN  Available  ClDeploymentSuccessful  ClJobSuccessful  ClNamespaceSuccessful  Ready
---                                   ---                 ---  ---        ---                     ---              ---                    ---
019dc049-5096-7f33-af06-8efe296e9e25  test-cluster-beta   1    ●(red)     -                       -                -                      ●(red)
019dc049-43a8-7a42-b44a-8d7f89e9e10f  test-cluster-alpha  3    ●(red)     ●(green)                ●(red)           ●(green)               ●(red)
executions.notes: Columns are dynamic based on which conditions exist. Status shown as colored dots: green=True, red=False, yellow=Unknown, -=not present

commands.description: List nodepools in current cluster in table format

executions.output:
ID                                    NAME       REPLICAS  TYPE           GEN  Available  NpConfigmapSuccessful  Ready
---                                   ---        ---       ---            ---  ---        ---                    ---
019dc049-e79e-72a9-94f8-0056a11193cd  workers-2  1         n2-standard-4  1    ●(red)     -                      ●(red)
019dc049-e76c-7be1-b201-0db50e2c8ecb  workers-1  1         n2-standard-4  2    ●(green)   ●(green)               ●(green)
executions.notes: Includes REPLICAS and TYPE columns not in cluster table. Dynamic condition columns.

commands.description: Combined table of all clusters and their nodepools

executions.output:
ID                                      NAME                GEN  READY  ADAPTERS
019dc049-5096-7f33-af06-8efe296e9e25    test-cluster-beta   1    ●(red)   0
019dc049-43a8-7a42-b44a-8d7f89e9e10f    test-cluster-alpha  3    ●(red)   4
  019dc049-e79e-72a9-94f8-0056a11193cd    workers-2         1    ●(red)   0
  019dc049-e76c-7be1-b201-0db50e2c8ecb    workers-1         2    ●(green) 1
executions.notes: Nodepools indented under their parent cluster. Shows adapter count. Has a known awk error on macOS (asorti not available in BSD awk).
